member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconEntry
member.summary: Represents a single icon entry in an icon group.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconEntry.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes an empty icon entry.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconEntry.#ctor(System.UInt16,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Creates a new icon entry with the provided identifier and language specifier.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconEntry.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the icon.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconEntry.Lcid
member.summary: Gets or sets the language identifier of the icon.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconEntry.Width
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of the icon in pixels. A width of 0 indicates 256 pixels.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconEntry.Height
member.summary: Gets or sets the height of the icon in pixels. A width of 0 indicates 256 pixels.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconEntry.ColorCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of colors in the color palette. Should be 0 if the image does not use a color palette.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconEntry.Reserved
member.summary: Reserved, should be zero.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconEntry.Planes
member.summary: When the icon is in ICO format: Gets or sets the number of color planes. Should be 0 or 1. When the icon is in CUR format: Gets or sets the horizontal coordinates of the hotspot in number of pixels from the left.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconEntry.BitsPerPixel
member.summary: When the icon is in ICO format: Gets or sets the number of bits per pixel. When the icon is in CUR format: Gets or sets the vertical coordinates of the hotspot in number of pixels from the top.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconEntry.PixelData
member.summary: Gets or sets the raw pixel data of the icon.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconEntry.GetPixelData
member.summary: Obtains the raw pixel data of the icon.
member.remarks: This method is called upon initialization of the property.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconEntry.Write(AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.ResourceDirectory,AsmResolver.IO.BinaryStreamWriter)
member.summary: Serializes the icon entry to the provided output stream and inserts the icon pixel data into the provided icons resource directory.
member.param: The icon entry directory to insert into.
member.exception: Occurs when there is already an icon added with the same ID.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconGroup
member.summary: Represents a single icon group.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconGroup.#ctor(System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Creates a new icon group.
member.param: The identifier of the icon group.
The language specifier of the icon group.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconGroup.#ctor(System.String,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Creates a new icon group.
member.param: The identifier of the icon group.
The language specifier of the icon group.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconGroup.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the icon.
member.remarks: This value has no meaning if is not null.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconGroup.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the icon. When null, is used instead.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconGroup.Lcid
member.summary: Gets or sets the language specifier of the group.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconGroup.Reserved
member.summary: Reserved, should be zero.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconGroup.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of icon that is stored in the group.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconGroup.Icons
member.summary: Gets the icons stored in the group.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconGroup.GetIcons
member.summary: Obtains the icons stored in the group.
member.remarks: This method is called upon initialization of the property.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconGroup.Write(AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.ResourceDirectory,AsmResolver.IO.BinaryStreamWriter)
member.summary: Serializes the icon group and inserts all icons in the group into the provided resource directory.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconResource
member.summary: Provides a high level view on icon and cursor resources stored in a PE image.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconResource.#ctor(AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconType)
member.summary: Creates a new icon resource of the provided icon type.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconResource.Type
member.summary: Gets the icon type the resource is storing.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconResource.Groups
member.summary: Gets the icon groups stored in the resource.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconResource.FromDirectory(AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.ResourceDirectory,AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconType)
member.summary: Reads icons from the provided root resource directory of a PE image.
member.returns: The resource, or null if no resource of the provided type was present.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconResource.GetGroup(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Gets an icon group by its numeric identifier.
member.exception: Occurs when the group was not present.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconResource.GetGroup(System.String)
member.summary: Gets an icon group by its string identifier.
member.exception: Occurs when the group was not present.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconResource.GetGroup(System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Gets an icon group by its numeric identifier.
member.exception: Occurs when the group was not present.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconResource.GetGroup(System.String,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Gets an icon group by its string identifier.
member.exception: Occurs when the group was not present.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconResource.TryGetGroup(System.UInt32,AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconGroup@)
member.summary: Attempts to get an icon group by its numeric identifier.
member.param: The group, or null if none was found.
member.returns: true if the group was found, false otherwise.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconResource.TryGetGroup(System.UInt32,System.UInt32,AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconGroup@)
member.summary: Attempts to get an icon group by its numeric identifier and language specifier.
member.param: The group, or null if none was found.
member.returns: true if the group was found, false otherwise.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconResource.TryGetGroup(System.String,AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconGroup@)
member.summary: Attempts to get an icon group by its string identifier.
member.param: The group, or null if none was found.
member.returns: true if the group was found, false otherwise.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconResource.TryGetGroup(System.String,System.UInt32,AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconGroup@)
member.summary: Attempts to get an icon group by its string identifier and language specifier.
member.param: The group, or null if none was found.
member.returns: true if the group was found, false otherwise.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconType
member.summary: Provides members describing all possible icon resources that can be stored in a PE image.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconType.Icon
member.summary: Indicates the icons stored in the group are ICO files.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.IconType.Cursor
member.summary: Indicates the icons stored in the group are CUR files.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.SerializedIconEntry
member.summary: Provides a lazy-initialized implementation of that reads from an existing resource.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.SerializedIconEntry.#ctor(System.UInt32,AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.ResourceDirectory,AsmResolver.IO.BinaryStreamReader@)
member.summary: Reads an icon entry from the provided input stream and corresponding icons directory.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.SerializedIconGroup
member.summary: Provides a lazy-initialized implementation of that reads its icons from an existing resource.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Icon.SerializedIconGroup.#ctor(System.UInt32,System.UInt32,AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.ResourceDirectory,AsmResolver.IO.BinaryStreamReader)
member.summary: Reads an icon group from the provided icon directory and input stream.
member.param: The directory containing the individual icons.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.IWin32Resource
member.summary: Provides a high level view of a native win32 resource that can be stored in the resources data directory of a portable executable (PE) image.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.IWin32Resource.InsertIntoDirectory(AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.ResourceDirectory)
member.summary: Serializes the win32 resource to the provided root win32 resource data directory.
member.param: The root directory to submit the changes to.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileFlags
member.summary: Provides members describing the attributes of the file in a version resource.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileFlags.Debug
member.summary: Indicates the file contains debugging information or is compiled with debugging features enabled.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileFlags.PreRelease
member.summary: Indicates the file is a development version and not a commercially released product.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileFlags.Patched
member.summary: Indicates the file has been modified and is not identical to the original shipping file of the same version number.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileFlags.PrivateBuild
member.summary: Indicates the file was not built using standard release procedures. If this flag is set, the StringFileInfo structure should contain a PrivateBuild entry.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileFlags.InfoInferred
member.summary: Indicates the file's version structure was created dynamically; therefore, some of the members in this structure may be empty or incorrect. This flag should never be set in a file's VS_VERSIONINFO data.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileFlags.SpecialBuild
member.summary: Indicates the file was built by the original company using standard release procedures but is a variation of the normal file of the same version number. If this flag is set, the StringFileInfo structure should contain a SpecialBuild entry.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileFlags.ValidBitMask
member.summary: Provides a bitmask for all valid known bits that can be set.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileOS
member.summary: Provides members describing the operating system for which the file is designed.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileOS.Unknown
member.summary: Indicates the operating system for which the file was designed is unknown to the system.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileOS.Windows16
member.summary: Indicates the file was designed for 16-bit Windows.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileOS.PresentationManager16
member.summary: Indicates the file was designed for 16-bit Presentation Manager.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileOS.PresentationManager32
member.summary: Indicates the file was designed for 32-bit Presentation Manager.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileOS.Windows32
member.summary: Indicates the file was designed for 32-bit Windows.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileOS.Dos
member.summary: Indicates the file was designed for MS-DOS.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileOS.OS216
member.summary: Indicates the file was designed for 16-bit OS/2.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileOS.OS232
member.summary: Indicates the file was designed for 16-bit OS/2.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileOS.NT
member.summary: Indicates the file was designed for Windows NT.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileSubType
member.summary: Provides members describing the function of the file.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileSubType.Unknown
member.summary: Indicates the file type is unknown to the system.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileSubType.DriverPrinter
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a printer driver.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileSubType.DriverKeyboard
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a keyboard driver.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileSubType.DriverLanguage
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a language driver.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileSubType.DriverDisplay
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a display driver.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileSubType.DriverMouse
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a mouse driver.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileSubType.DriverNetwork
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a network driver.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileSubType.DriverSystem
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a system driver.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileSubType.DriverInstallable
member.summary: Indicates the file contains an installable driver.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileSubType.DriverSound
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a sound driver.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileSubType.DriverCommunications
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a communications driver.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileSubType.DriverVersionedPrinter
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a versioned printer driver.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileSubType.FontRaster
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a raster font.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileSubType.FontVector
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a vector font.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileSubType.FontTrueType
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a TrueType font.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileType
member.summary: Provides members describing the general type of file.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileType.Unknown
member.summary: Indicates the file type is unknown to the system.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileType.App
member.summary: Indicates the file contains an application.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileType.Dll
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a DLL.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileType.Driver
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a device driver.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileType.Font
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a font.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileType.VirtualDevice
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a virtual device.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FileType.StaticLibrary
member.summary: Indicates the file contains a static-link library.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FixedVersionInfo
member.summary: Represents the organization of data in a file-version resource. It is the root structure that contains all other file-version information structures.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FixedVersionInfo.Signature
member.summary: The signature value a FixedVersionInfo structure starts with.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FixedVersionInfo.FromReader(AsmResolver.IO.BinaryStreamReader@)
member.summary: Reads a single fixed version info structure from an input stream.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FixedVersionInfo.FileVersion
member.summary: Gets or sets the file version number.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FixedVersionInfo.ProductVersion
member.summary: Gets or sets the product version number.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FixedVersionInfo.FileFlagsMask
member.summary: Gets or sets the bitmask that specifies the valid bits in . A bit is valid only if it was defined when the file was created.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FixedVersionInfo.FileFlags
member.summary: Gets or sets the bitmask that specifies the attributes of the file.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FixedVersionInfo.FileOS
member.summary: Gets or ses the operating system for which this file was designed.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FixedVersionInfo.FileType
member.summary: Gets or sets the general type of file.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FixedVersionInfo.FileSubType
member.summary: Gets or sets the function of the file.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.FixedVersionInfo.FileDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the binary creation date and time stamp

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringFileInfo
member.summary: Represents the organization of data in a file-version resource. It contains version information that can be displayed for a particular language and code page.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringFileInfo.StringFileInfoKey
member.summary: The name of the StringFileInfo entry.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringFileInfo.FromReader(System.UInt64,AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntryHeader,AsmResolver.IO.BinaryStreamReader@)
member.summary: Reads a single StringFileInfo structure from the provided input stream.
member.param: The offset of the consumed header.
member.remarks: This function assumes the provided header was already consumed.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringFileInfo.Tables
member.summary: Gets a collection of tables stored in this VarFileInfo structure, typically containing a list of languages that the application or DLL supports.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringTable
member.summary: Represents the organization of data in a file-version resource. It contains language and code page formatting information for the strings specified by the Children member. A code page is an ordered character set.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringTable.CommentsKey
member.summary: The name of the string describing the comments assigned to the executable file.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringTable.CompanyNameKey
member.summary: The name of the string describing the name of the company that developed the executable file.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringTable.FileDescriptionKey
member.summary: The name of the string describing the executable in such a way that it can be presented to users.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringTable.FileVersionKey
member.summary: The name of the string describing the version of the file.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringTable.InternalNameKey
member.summary: The name of the string describing the internal name of the file.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringTable.LegalCopyrightKey
member.summary: The name of the string describing the copyright notices that apply to the file.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringTable.LegalTrademarksKey
member.summary: The name of the string describing the trademark notices that apply to the file.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringTable.OriginalFilenameKey
member.summary: The name of the string providing the original file name.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringTable.PrivateBuildKey
member.summary: The name of the string describing by whom, where, and why this private version of the file was built.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringTable.ProductNameKey
member.summary: The name of the string describing the name of the product with which this file is distributed.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringTable.ProductVersionKey
member.summary: The name of the string describing the version of the product with which this file is distributed.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringTable.SpecialBuildKey
member.summary: The name of the string describing how this version of the file differs from the normal version

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringTable.#ctor(System.UInt16,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Creates a new string table.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringTable.LanguageIdentifier
member.summary: Gets or sets the language identifier of this string table.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringTable.CodePage
member.summary: Gets or sets the code page of this string table.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.StringTable.FromReader(AsmResolver.IO.BinaryStreamReader@)
member.summary: Reads a single StringTable structure from the provided input stream.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VarFileInfo
member.summary: Represents the organization of data in a file-version resource. It contains version information not dependent on a particular language and code page combination.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VarFileInfo.VarFileInfoKey
member.summary: The name of the VarFileInfo entry.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VarFileInfo.FromReader(System.UInt64,AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntryHeader,AsmResolver.IO.BinaryStreamReader@)
member.summary: Reads a single VarFileInfo structure from the provided input stream.
member.param: The offset of the consumed header.
member.remarks: This function assumes the provided header was already consumed.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VarFileInfo.Tables
member.summary: Gets a collection of tables stored in this VarFileInfo structure, typically containing a list of languages that the application or DLL supports.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VarTable
member.summary: Represents the organization of data in a file-version resource. It typically contains a list of language and code page identifier pairs that the version of the application or DLL supports.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VarTable.TranslationKey
member.summary: The name of the Var entry.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VarTable.FromReader(AsmResolver.IO.BinaryStreamReader@)
member.summary: Reads a single Var table at the provided input stream.
member.exception: Occurs when the input stream does not point to a valid Var table structure.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VarTable.Values
member.summary: Gets a collection of one or more values that are language and code page identifier pairs.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionInfoResource
member.summary: Represents a native version resource file.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionInfoResource.VsVersionInfoKey
member.summary: The name of the root object of the native version resource file.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionInfoResource.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new empty version info resource targeting the English (United States) language identifier.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionInfoResource.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new empty version info resource.
member.param: The language identifier the resource version info is targeting.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionInfoResource.Lcid
member.summary: Gets the language identifier the resource version info is targeting.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionInfoResource.FixedVersionInfo
member.summary: Gets the fixed version info stored in this version resource.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionInfoResource.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Gets or sets a version table entry by its name.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionInfoResource.FindAllFromDirectory(AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.ResourceDirectory)
member.summary: Obtains all version info resources from the provided root win32 resources directory.
member.param: The root resources directory to extract the version info from.
member.returns: The version info resource, or null if none was found.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionInfoResource.FromDirectory(AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.ResourceDirectory)
member.summary: Obtains the first version info resource from the provided root win32 resources directory.
member.param: The root resources directory to extract the version info from.
member.returns: The version info resource, or null if none was found.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionInfoResource.FromDirectory(AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.ResourceDirectory,System.Int32)
member.summary: Obtains the version info resource from the provided root win32 resources directory.
member.param: The root resources directory to extract the version info from.
The language identifier to get the version info from.
member.returns: The version info resource, or null if none was found.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionInfoResource.FromResourceData(AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.ResourceData)
member.summary: Obtains the version info resource from the provided resource data entry.
member.param: The data entry to extract the version info from.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionInfoResource.FromReader(AsmResolver.IO.BinaryStreamReader@)
member.summary: Reads a version resource from an input stream.
member.exception: Occurs when the input stream does not point to a valid version resource.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionInfoResource.FromReader(System.Int32,AsmResolver.IO.BinaryStreamReader@)
member.summary: Reads a version resource from an input stream.
member.param: The language identifier to get the version info from.
member.exception: Occurs when the input stream does not point to a valid version resource.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionInfoResource.GetChildren
member.summary: Gets a collection of entries stored in the version resource.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionInfoResource.GetChild``1(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a version table entry by its name.
member.typeparam: The type of the version table entry to lookup.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionInfoResource.AddEntry(AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntry)
member.summary: Adds (or overrides the existing entry with the same name) to the version resource.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionInfoResource.RemoveEntry(System.String)
member.summary: Remove an entry by its name.
member.param: The name of the child to remove..
member.returns: true if the name existed in the table and was removed successfully, false otherwise.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntry
member.summary: Provides a base for all version tables stored in a native version resource file.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntry.Key
member.summary: Gets the name of the table.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntry.ValueType
member.summary: Gets the value type of the table.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntry.CreateHeader
member.summary: Creates a new header for the table entry.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntry.GetValueLength
member.summary: Gets the length of the raw value.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntry.WriteValue(AsmResolver.IO.BinaryStreamWriter)
member.summary: Writes the value field of the version structure.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntryHeader
member.summary: Represents the raw version table entry header.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntryHeader.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new version table entry header with the provided key.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntryHeader.#ctor(System.UInt16,System.UInt16,AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableValueType,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new version table entry header with the provided key.
member.param: The length in bytes of the structure.
The size in bytes of the value member.
The type of data that is stored.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntryHeader.Length
member.summary: Gets or sets the raw length in bytes of the structure.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntryHeader.ValueLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the raw length in bytes of the value member.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntryHeader.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating the value is binary or textual.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntryHeader.Key
member.summary: Gets or sets the key name of the resource.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntryHeader.FromReader(AsmResolver.IO.BinaryStreamReader@)
member.summary: Reads a single resource table header.

member.name: M:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableEntryHeader.GetHeaderSize(System.String)
member.summary: Computes the size of the raw header in bytes.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableValueType
member.summary: Provides members describing the value type of a version resource entry.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableValueType.Binary
member.summary: Indicates the value is binary.

member.name: F:AsmResolver.PE.Win32Resources.Version.VersionTableValueType.String
member.summary: Indicates the value is textual.

member.name: T:AsmResolver.LazyPropertyAttribute
member.summary: Specifies an auto property is lazily initialized and that this implementation is provided by a source generator
member.remarks:
The source generator generates for every property X marked with this attribute the following:
A private field _x to store the value of the property
A private constant XMask specifying the bit mask within the initialization vector _initialized
A call to a parameterless method GetX()
In case is set, the source generator will also generate code to automatically test and update exclusive ownership of the property's value.

member.name: P:AsmResolver.LazyPropertyAttribute.OwnerProperty
member.summary: When non-null, gets the name of the property that reflects the owner of the marked property's value.
member.remarks: Use this to indicate the value of the property is exclusively owned by at most one instance of the enclosing class.
